channel.title: Black Friday Tips on Insights.HighDeals
channel.description: Recent content in Black Friday Tips on Insights.HighDeals

item.title: Amazon Product Listings Explained: What Every Section Means
item.description: Amazon product pages contain far more information than most shoppers realize. This guide breaks down every section of a listing and explains how experienced deal hunters analyze prices, reviews, sellers, and hidden signals before deciding whether a deal is truly worth buying.
